texts.label: text
texts.orig: Stay with us ..........Your home in africa W ith spectacular views of Mt. Longonot and the pearly fresh waters of  Lake Naivasha, The Sawela lodges in Naivasha Kenya will have you relaxed and rested in no time. Offering luxury accommodation for both local and international guests, the lodge has become a home away for many discerning guests. From  inception, the founders wanted to create a special place removed from the routine and busy happenings of our daily lives. That space that would be tranquil, relaxing, beautiful, and natural and it would help our guests unwind, recoup and have fun.
texts.text: Stay with us ..........Your home in africa W ith spectacular views of Mt. From  inception, the founders wanted to create a special place removed from the routine and busy happenings of our daily lives. texts.label: text
texts.orig: The name Sawela means 'Comfort in a Bird's Nest'. Welcome to Sawela ( Karibu Sawela )
texts.text: The name Sawela means 'Comfort in a Bird's Nest'. Welcome to Sawela ( Karibu Sawela )

texts.text: ◆ Manicured Gardens perfect for Weddings & Events

texts.orig: ◆ Sawela Cruiser - The Boat ride experience
texts.text: ◆ Sawela Cruiser - The Boat ride experience

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Wine and dine in one of the best Lodges in Kenya, starting with fresh produce from the local farms and the neighbouring counties, Chef Kennethy and his culinary team showcase the best of the local produce enhanced by classic cutting edge techniques. One of the many favorites of our guest is the Grilled Tilapia fish that when prepared stays soft on the inside and crisp on the outside from the chefs low heat slow cooking technique.
texts.text: Wine and dine in one of the best Lodges in Kenya, starting with fresh produce from the local farms and the neighbouring counties, Chef Kennethy and his culinary team showcase the best of the local produce enhanced by classic cutting edge techniques. One of the many favorites of our guest is the Grilled Tilapia fish that when prepared stays soft on the inside and crisp on the outside from the chefs low heat slow cooking technique.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our Gourmet offerings have been developed to suite the many request from our varied discerning guest. Starting with local cuisine, our chefs are well versed in French, Italian, Indian and American continental foods.
texts.text: Our Gourmet offerings have been developed to suite the many request from our varied discerning guest. Starting with local cuisine, our chefs are well versed in French, Italian, Indian and American continental foods.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: As our put it 'Savor the selection of the finest food options available at The Sawela Lodge, and
texts.text: As our put it 'Savor the selection of the finest food options available at The Sawela Lodge, and

texts.label: text
texts.orig: prepare yourself for a culinary experience like none other from the Chefs corner; a cuisine that will inspire even the most discerning palates. It's our pleasure'.
texts.text: prepare yourself for a culinary experience like none other from the Chefs corner; a cuisine that will inspire even the most discerning palates. It's our pleasure'.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kenya Weddings, Weddings in Kenya, located at the shores of Lake Naivasha, The Sawela Lodge is beyond doubt your ideal best wedding venues and destinations in Kenya. By offering local insight through Team Sawela's years of experience, our Weddings in Kenya expertise extends beyond planning luxurious weddings ceremonies & receptions to offering you peace of mind as you plan this unforgettable moment.
texts.text: Kenya Weddings, Weddings in Kenya, located at the shores of Lake Naivasha, The Sawela Lodge is beyond doubt your ideal best wedding venues and destinations in Kenya. By offering local insight through Team Sawela's years of experience, our Weddings in Kenya expertise extends beyond planning luxurious weddings ceremonies & receptions to offering you peace of mind as you plan this unforgettable moment.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Sawela has hosted a variety of weddings as per our guest requirements. From Traditional, to classic, to destination weddings, the Lakeshore backdrop has proven to be the most ideal.
texts.text: The Sawela has hosted a variety of weddings as per our guest requirements. From Traditional, to classic, to destination weddings, the Lakeshore backdrop has proven to be the most ideal.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: It's a promise to provide a seamless service from the start of your wedding plans to your honeymoon and beyond. Experience is everything, & our wedding planners create truly personal, memorable occasions.
texts.text: It's a promise to provide a seamless service from the start of your wedding plans to your honeymoon and beyond. Experience is everything, & our wedding planners create truly personal, memorable occasions.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Sawela Lodges Kenya offers unique hotel conference facilities and venues in Naivasha, from seminar to conference and accommodation at our exclusive lodge in Naivasha. With a variety of extra services to help you plan and organize a successful conference or workshop, we have 8 Conference halls, 2 boardrooms and breakaway rooms on request, in addition large spacious grounds for outdoor conference on request.
texts.text: The Sawela Lodges Kenya offers unique hotel conference facilities and venues in Naivasha, from seminar to conference and accommodation at our exclusive lodge in Naivasha. With a variety of extra services to help you plan and organize a successful conference or workshop, we have 8 Conference halls, 2 boardrooms and breakaway rooms on request, in addition large spacious grounds for outdoor conference on request.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Apart from the beautiful room décor spiced by elegant furniture designs, cheering curtains and beddings, the rooms have enormous window lounges that let in sufficient natural light and a wonderful fresh breeze. The rooms' luxury toiletries and bathrooms have been designed to offer a luxury experience to our esteemed guests.
texts.text: Apart from the beautiful room décor spiced by elegant furniture designs, cheering curtains and beddings, the rooms have enormous window lounges that let in sufficient natural light and a wonderful fresh breeze. The rooms' luxury toiletries and bathrooms have been designed to offer a luxury experience to our esteemed guests.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: With our touch of Africa signature décor, our facilities come with amenities to include hairdryers, beautiful bathrobes coffee and tea making facilities. All our rooms offer timeless comfort to our Guests ensuring an added measure of excellence at every moment of your stay. All our hotel guests enjoy 24 hr free access to Wi-Fi internet as well as free swimming pool.
